papers.title: PALS: Power-Aware LLM Serving for Mixture-of-Experts Models
papers.summary: Presents a power-aware runtime for LLM serving that treats GPU power caps as a controllable resource and jointly tunes them with batch size. It integrates with vLLM and evaluates dense and MoE models on multi-GPU systems.
papers.reason: 近 30 天 LLM 推理系统：MoE serving、GPU 功耗控制、vLLM 集成和 QoS 违约率都直接对应 2026 年 AI 基建成本问题。

papers.title: DroidSpeak: KV Cache Sharing Across Fine-tuned Model Variants
papers.summary: Studies KV cache sharing across fine-tuned model variants in multi-LLM serving. DroidSpeak selectively recomputes sensitive layers and reuses the remaining KV cache to cut redundant prefill work.
papers.reason: 2026 NSDI / Microsoft 参与的推理系统：多模型协作、KV cache 共享、fine-tuned variants 和 agentic workflow 都是大厂线上服务会遇到的问题。

papers.title: QoServe: Breaking the Silos of LLM Inference Serving
papers.summary: Introduces a QoS-driven LLM inference serving system for co-scheduling diverse latency classes on shared GPU infrastructure. It uses fine-grained QoS classification, dynamic chunking and hybrid prioritization to improve utilization under overload.
papers.reason: 2026 ASPLOS / Microsoft Research：把 interactive 与 batch 推理从资源孤岛里合并调度，适合看大厂 AI 服务的 SLO、goodput 和过载降级。

papers.title: ForkKV: Scaling Multi-LoRA Agent Serving via Copy-on-Write Disaggregated KV Cache
papers.summary: Uses an OS-like fork and copy-on-write memory model for multi-LoRA agent serving, splitting KV cache into a shared base component and lightweight agent-specific parts with a custom ResidualAttention kernel.
papers.reason: 近 90 天 LLM 推理系统：多 LoRA agent serving、KV cache 分离、copy-on-write 和定制 kernel，适合和 DroidSpeak 对照看。

papers.title: StreamWise: Serving Multi-Modal Generation in Real-Time at Scale
papers.summary: Studies real-time multi-modal generation serving at scale, coordinating LLMs, text-to-speech, image, audio and video generation under latency, cost and quality constraints with adaptive scheduling and heterogeneous hardware.
papers.reason: 2026 Microsoft/Azure Research 推理服务系统：从纯 LLM 扩到多模态生成链路，重点是 SLO、异构资源调度、成本和实时流式体验。

papers.title: ReviveMoE: Fast Recovery for Hardware Failures in Large-Scale MoE LLM Inference Deployments
papers.summary: Targets failure recovery for large-scale MoE inference deployments, avoiding full serving-instance restarts when hardware failures occur. The system is integrated with Huawei Cloud's MaaS stack and xDeepServe platform.
papers.reason: 2026 Huawei Cloud 大规模 MoE 推理部署：关注硬件故障恢复、MaaS 稳定性和 xDeepServe 生产栈，属于线上服务可靠性方向。

papers.title: DistServe: Disaggregating Prefill and Decoding for Goodput-optimized Large Language Model Serving
papers.summary: Separates prefill and decode onto different GPU groups and optimizes placement under latency SLOs, improving goodput for LLM serving workloads with different prompt and output lengths.
papers.reason: LLM 推理经典轮换：prefill/decode disaggregation 是 2024 以后推理系统很重要的工程方向。

papers.title: Taiji: Pareto Optimal Policy Optimization with Semantics-IDs Trade-off for Industrial LLM-Enhanced Recommendation
papers.summary: Presents Taiji, an industrial LLM-as-Enhancer recommender framework that aligns LLM semantic rewards with collaborative ID preference rewards through Pareto Optimal Policy Optimization. It reports offline and online A/B validation and deployment on Kuaishou advertising traffic.
papers.reason: 近 30 天工业推荐主线：Kuaishou 广告平台、LLM4Rec、Semantic IDs、RL 对齐和线上 A/B 都在一篇里。

papers.title: Tencent Advertising Algorithm Challenge 2025: All-Modality Generative Recommendation
papers.summary: Introduces TencentGR-1M and TencentGR-10M, two de-identified Tencent Ads datasets for all-modality generative recommendation with exposure, click and conversion signals, plus task definitions, baselines and competition findings.
papers.reason: 近 90 天大厂推荐数据集方向：工业广告、生成式推荐、全模态特征、点击和转化目标都很贴近线上系统。

papers.title: RTP-LLM: High-Performance Alibaba LLM Inference Engine
papers.summary: Technical report for Alibaba's production LLM inference engine, covering model loading, prefill-decode disaggregation, hierarchical KV cache reuse, speculative decoding, quantization and multimodal inference.
papers.reason: 新的业界笔记/技术报告：5 月底阿里生产推理引擎，直接对标 vLLM/SGLang，适合把经典推理论文落到工业系统。

papers.title: Next-Scale Generative Reranking: A Tree-based Generative Rerank Method at Meituan
papers.summary: Proposes NSGR, a tree-based generative reranking framework that expands recommendation lists from coarse to fine and uses a multi-scale evaluator to guide generation. The method is reported as deployed on Meituan food delivery.
papers.reason: 近 90 天工业重排方向：Meituan 线上部署，聚焦多阶段推荐里的 generative reranking 和全局/局部列表建模。

papers.title: MBGR: Multi-Business Prediction for Generative Recommendation at Meituan
papers.summary: Builds a multi-business generative recommendation framework with business-aware semantic IDs, business-specific prediction and dynamic label routing. It reports offline and online validation on Meituan food delivery.
papers.reason: 近 90 天工业生成式推荐：重点是多业务场景、Semantic ID 空间隔离和生产验证。

papers.title: Fast Transformer Decoding: One Write-Head is All You Need
papers.summary: Introduces multi-query attention, sharing keys and values across attention heads to reduce memory bandwidth during incremental transformer decoding.
papers.reason: LLM 推理经典轮换：MQA 是后续 GQA、KV cache 压缩和高吞吐 decoder 设计的早期关键论文。

papers.title: LLM.int8(): 8-bit Matrix Multiplication for Transformers at Scale
papers.summary: Introduces a mixed-precision int8 inference procedure that handles emergent outlier features and enables large transformer inference with substantially lower memory use.
papers.reason: LLM 推理经典轮换：低比特推理的基础论文之一，适合和 SmoothQuant、AWQ、GPTQ 放在一起比较。

papers.title: Transparent and Controllable Recommendation Filtering via Multimodal Multi-Agent Collaboration
papers.summary: Introduces a controllable recommendation filtering framework combining end-to-cloud collaboration, multimodal perception, multi-agent adjudication and editable preference graphs to reduce over-filtering in personalized feeds.
papers.reason: 近 90 天 Microsoft Research 推荐治理方向：不是单纯 CTR，而是个性化 feed 的可控过滤、透明度和多模态安全边界。

papers.title: Deep Neural Networks for YouTube Recommendations
papers.summary: A production-scale two-stage recommendation system with candidate generation and ranking. It remains a useful mental model for large-scale retrieval-rank architectures in industrial recommender systems.
papers.reason: 推荐系统工业范式的核心参考：召回、排序、特征、训练样本和线上服务都讲得很实用。

papers.title: DeepFM: A Factorization-Machine based Neural Network for CTR Prediction
papers.summary: Combines factorization machines and deep networks for CTR prediction, learning low-order and high-order feature interactions jointly without manual feature engineering.
papers.reason: CTR 排序模型经典基线，适合对照 Wide&Deep、DCN、DIN 等后续结构。

papers.title: Neural Collaborative Filtering
papers.summary: Generalizes matrix factorization with neural architectures for collaborative filtering. The paper is a clean anchor for understanding implicit feedback recommendation with learned user-item interactions.
papers.reason: 协同过滤神经化的基础论文，适合回看 embedding、负采样和排序损失设计。

papers.title: Self-Attentive Sequential Recommendation
papers.summary: Introduces SASRec, using self-attention for sequential recommendation. It is a durable baseline for session behavior modeling and next-item prediction.
papers.reason: 序列推荐必读，能直接连接到 transformer、用户行为建模和长期兴趣捕捉。

papers.title: FlashAttention: Fast and Memory-Efficient Exact Attention with IO-Awareness
papers.summary: Reorders exact attention computation around GPU memory hierarchy to reduce IO and improve speed. It is central to modern efficient transformer inference and training.
papers.reason: LLM 推理优化核心论文，读完更容易理解 attention kernel、显存瓶颈和吞吐优化。

papers.title: vLLM: Easy, Fast, and Cheap LLM Serving with PagedAttention
papers.summary: Presents PagedAttention and a serving system that manages KV cache like virtual memory, improving batching and memory utilization for high-throughput LLM inference.
papers.reason: 服务化推理绕不开的系统论文，KV cache、continuous batching 和吞吐成本都很关键。

papers.title: Fast Inference from Transformers via Speculative Decoding
papers.summary: Uses a small draft model to propose tokens and a larger model to verify them, reducing decoding latency while preserving exact output distribution under the algorithm's assumptions.
papers.reason: 理解 LLM 解码加速的重要入口，适合和 Medusa、EAGLE、lookahead decoding 对照。

papers.title: Mamba: Linear-Time Sequence Modeling with Selective State Spaces
papers.summary: Introduces a selective state space architecture aimed at efficient long-sequence modeling. It is often discussed alongside attention alternatives and hardware-aware sequence model design.
papers.reason: 适合跟踪长序列、推理吞吐和 attention 替代架构的取舍。

papers.title: BERT4Rec: Sequential Recommendation with Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformer
papers.summary: Applies bidirectional Transformer encoders to sequential recommendation and uses cloze-style objectives for item sequence modeling.
papers.reason: 推荐算法与 transformer 结合的经典切入点，适合跟 SASRec 对照。

papers.title: Wide & Deep Learning for Recommender Systems
papers.summary: Combines memorization from wide linear models with generalization from deep neural networks for app recommendation.
papers.reason: 工业 CTR 排序结构的基础范式，适合和 DeepFM、DCN 一起读。

papers.title: GQA: Training Generalized Multi-Query Transformer Models from Multi-Head Checkpoints
papers.summary: Studies grouped-query attention as a practical middle ground between multi-head attention quality and multi-query attention inference efficiency.
papers.reason: KV cache 和吞吐优化相关，适合理解现代 LLM decoder 结构取舍。

papers.title: SmoothQuant: Accurate and Efficient Post-Training Quantization for Large Language Models
papers.summary: Moves activation outliers into weights to enable efficient post-training quantization for LLMs while preserving accuracy.
papers.reason: 量化推理的重要论文，适合跟 AWQ、GPTQ、FP8 serving 一起看。

papers.title: Deep Interest Network for Click-Through Rate Prediction
papers.summary: Introduces an attention-based network to adaptively activate user interests from historical behavior for CTR prediction.
papers.reason: 阿里 DIN 系列的起点，适合关注用户兴趣建模和行为序列特征。

papers.title: Neural Graph Collaborative Filtering
papers.summary: Models high-order user-item connectivity with graph neural networks for collaborative filtering.
papers.reason: 图推荐代表作之一，适合跟 LightGCN 和 graph retrieval 方法一起看。

papers.title: AWQ: Activation-aware Weight Quantization for LLM Compression and Acceleration
papers.summary: Uses activation-aware weight protection to quantize large language models for efficient deployment with limited accuracy loss.
papers.reason: 权重量化和部署优化方向的常用基线，适合跟 SmoothQuant、GPTQ 对照。
